description: Capture short emotional disclosures verbatim into userObservations.emotionalState. Handles 'I'm feeling stressed', 'feeling anxious', 'I'm overwhelmed', 'I'm burned out', 'tough day', 'great day', 'feeling productive', 'venting'. One short warm acknowledgement, no platitudes, no advice unless asked. Crisis signals (explicit suicide / self-harm / harm-others / severe-hopelessness-with-planning) trigger a locked support reply with zero writes.
